content.query:
IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT  *
                FROM    sys.schemas
                WHERE   name = 'mipins' )
    EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA mipins]');
GO

----CREATE VIEW FOR EMPLOYEE

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee
AS
SELECT DISTINCT

 emp.EmployeeID                         as PersonID
,hrr.HRRecordID
,emp.FirstName                          as EmployeeFirstName
,emp.LastName                           as EmployeeLastName
,(emp.FirstName + ' ' + emp.LastName)   as EmployeeName
,CASE
    WHEN emp.Gender = 'Female' THEN '01'
    WHEN emp.Gender = 'Male' THEN '02'
    ELSE '03' 
    END                                 as GenderID
,emp.Gender
,emp_fact.DOB
,hrr.LocationID
,hrr.PayBandID                          as GradeID
,hrr.PersonnelAreaID
,hrr.PayrollAreaID
,hrr.OrganisationalUnitID
,hrr.PersonnelSubAreaID
,hrr.ContractID                         as WorkContractID
,hrr.CompanyCode
,hrr.CostCenterID
,hrr.EmployeeGroupID
,hrr.PositionID
,hrr.WorkScheduleID
,emp_fact.EmployeeNumber
,emp_fact.LegacyEmployeeNumber
,emp.CivilServiceStart                  as CivilServiceStartDate
,emp.DateToCurrentJob
,emp.DateToSubstantiveGrade
,emp.SeniorityDate
,emp.OrgStartDate                       as RoleStartDate
,emp.FixTermEndDate
,emp.LoanStartDate
,emp.LoanEndDate
,emp.ReasonForAction
,emp.AnnualSalary
,emp.Currency
,emp.Postcode
,emp.AddressLine1
,emp.AddressLine2
,emp.AddressLine3
,emp.City
,emp.County
,CONVERT(float, emp.FTE)                as FTEPercentage
,CONVERT(float, emp.FTE)  / 100         as FTE
,emp.WorkHours
,emp.EmploymentStatus
,emp.PartTimeEmployee
,eg.EEGrp                               as EmployeeGroupCode
,eg.EmployeeGroup                       as EmployeeGroup
,cc.CostCenterCode
,cc.Description                         as CostCenterCentre
,ps.PositionCode
,ps.Description                         as Position
,ws.WorkScheduleRule
,ws.WorkWeekDays
,ws.WorkWeekHours
,ws.WorkDayHours
,pb.PSGroupCode                         as Grade
,CASE 
    WHEN pb.Description IS NULL THEN pb.PSGroupCode
    ELSE pb.Description 
    END                                 as GradeDescription
,CASE 
    WHEN pb.PSGroupCode = 'APP AO' THEN 'AO'
    WHEN pb.PSGroupCode = 'APP EO' THEN 'EO'
    WHEN pb.PSGroupCode = 'GM' THEN 'G6'
    WHEN pb.PSGroupCode = 'SCSPB1' THEN 'G5+'
    WHEN pb.PSGroupCode = 'SCSPB2' THEN 'G5+'
    ELSE pb.PSGroupCode
    END                                 as GradeGroupV1
,CASE 
    WHEN pb.PSGroupCode IN ('AA','AO','APP AO') THEN 'AA & AO'
    WHEN pb.PSGroupCode = 'GM' THEN 'G6'
    WHEN pb.PSGroupCode = 'SCSPB1' THEN 'G5+'
    WHEN pb.PSGroupCode = 'SCSPB2' THEN 'G5+'
    ELSE pb.PSGroupCode
    END                                 as GradeGroupV2
,CASE 
    WHEN pb.PSGroupCode IN ('APO','BAND 1','BAND 2','BAND 3') THEN 'Inspector'
    ELSE 'OTH/P'
    END                                 as JobCategoryShort
,CASE 
    WHEN pb.PSGroupCode IN ('APO','BAND 1','BAND 2','BAND 3') THEN 'Inspector'
    ELSE 'Other Profession'
    END                                 as JobCategory
,pa.PersonnelAreaCode
,pa.Description                         as PersonnelArea
,pra.PayrollAreaCode
,pra.Description                        as PayrollArea
,ou.OrganisationUnit                    as OrganisationalUnitCode
,ou.Description                         as OrganisationUnit
,psa.PersonnelSubAreaCode
,psa.Description                        as PersonnelSubArea
,co.ContractCode                        as WorkContractCode
,co.Description                         as WorkContract
,CASE 
    WHEN co.Description = 'Permanent' THEN 'Permanent'
    ELSE 'Non-Permanent'
    END                                 as WorkContractType
,m1.managerEmployeeID                   as L1ManagerID
,emp1.FirstName                         as L1ManagerFirstName
,emp1.LastName                          as L1ManagerLastName
,(emp1.FirstName + ' ' + emp1.LastName) as L1ManagerName
,m2.managerEmployeeID                   as L2ManagerID
,emp2.FirstName                         as L2ManagerFirstName
,emp2.LastName                          as L2ManagerLastName
,(emp2.FirstName + ' ' + emp2.LastName) as L2ManagerName
,emp.IsActive                           as EmployeeIsActive
,hrr.IsActive                           as RoleIsActive
,emp_fact.IsActive                      as FactIsActive
,emp.ValidTo                            as EmployeeValidTo
,hrr.ValidTo                            as RoleValidTo
,emp_fact.ValidTo                       as FactValidTo

FROM  [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] emp

LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_record_fact] hrr
ON  emp.EmployeeID = hrr.EmployeeID
--AND hrr.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN  [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_fact] emp_fact
ON  hrr.EmployeeID = emp_fact.EmployeeID
--AND emp_fact.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employeegroup_dim] eg
ON hrr.EmployeeGroupID = eg.EmployeeGroupID
AND eg.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN  [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_costcenter_dim] cc
ON hrr.CostCenterID = cc.CostCenterID
AND cc.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_position_dim] ps
ON hrr.PositionID = ps.PositionID
AND ps.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_work_schedule_dim] ws
ON hrr.WorkScheduleID = ws.WorkScheduleID
AND ws.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_payband_dim] pb
ON hrr.PayBandID = pb.PayBandID
AND pb.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_personnel_area_dim] pa
ON hrr.PersonnelAreaID = pa.PersonnelAreaID
AND pa.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN [hr_payroll_area_dim] pra
ON hrr.PayrollAreaID = pra.PayrollAreaID
AND pra.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_organisation_unit_dim] ou
ON hrr.OrganisationalUnitID = ou.OrganisationUnitID
AND ou.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_personnel_sub_area_dim] psa
ON hrr.PersonnelSubAreaID = psa.PersonnelSubAreaID
AND psa.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_contract_dim] co
ON hrr.ContractID = co.ContractID
AND co.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_hr_hierarchy_dim] m1
ON m1.EmployeeID = emp.EmployeeID
AND m1.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] emp1
ON m1.managerEmployeeID = emp1.EmployeeID
AND emp1.IsActive = 'Y'
  
LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_hr_hierarchy_dim] m2
ON m2.EmployeeID = m1.managerEmployeeID
AND m2.IsActive = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] emp2
ON m2.managerEmployeeID = emp2.EmployeeID
AND emp2.IsActive = 'Y'

AND emp.EmployeeID IS NOT NULL

GO
